page.title: K80 Charter Review: What It's Like Onboard in Marbella

data.meta_description: Read our honest K80 Marbella review: 24m yacht, 12 guests, jet ski included. What it's really like onboard in Puerto Banús. Book your charter today.
data.summary: An honest review of the K80 charter experience in Marbella, covering the yacht's specs, onboard amenities, and the best spots to visit from Puerto Banús.
key_facts: 24-metre K80 yacht departs from Puerto Banús
Includes jet ski, licensed skipper, fuel, drinks, snacks, insurance, and VAT
Onboard amenities: spacious flybridge, sun pads, indoor saloon, and bow seating
Ideal for day trips to Cabopino, Estepona, or Cala del Faro

faq.q: How many people can the K80 in Marbella accommodate?
faq.a: The K80 is licensed for a maximum of 12 guests. This is the legal limit including children, so your party cannot exceed 12 passengers.

faq.q: Does the K80 charter include a jet ski?
faq.a: Yes, the K80 charter includes a jet ski at no extra cost. You can use it during the trip, subject to safety instructions from the skipper.

faq.q: What is the minimum charter duration for the K80?
faq.a: The minimum charter for the K80 is 4 hours. Longer durations are available and recommended to explore further destinations like Estepona or Sotogrande.

faq.q: What drinks and food are provided on the K80?
faq.a: All charters include water, soft drinks, beer, white wine, cava, and light snacks. You are welcome to bring your own food or arrange catering via our team.

faq.q: Can I choose the itinerary on the K80?
faq.a: Yes, the itinerary is flexible. The skipper will suggest a route based on weather and your preferences. Popular options include Cabopino, Cala del Faro, and Estepona.

faq.q: Is the K80 suitable for corporate events or celebrations?
faq.a: Absolutely. The K80's spacious flybridge and saloon make it ideal for corporate entertaining, birthdays, or any group celebration. Contact us for bespoke arrangements.

faq.q: What is the cancellation policy for the K80 charter?
faq.a: Cancellations are subject to our standard terms. We recommend checking with our team at the time of booking for the specific policy. Weather-related cancellations are handled flexibly.

faq.q: How do I book the K80 in Marbella?
faq.a: Booking is via WhatsApp or our website. Since pricing is on request, simply contact us with your preferred date and duration, and we will confirm availability and quote.

data.body_html:
If you're looking for a luxury yacht charter in Marbella that balances space, performance, and onboard fun, the K80 is a standout choice. This 24-metre motor yacht departs from Puerto Banús and can take up to 12 guests for a full day on the Costa del Sol. In this K80 Marbella review, we walk you through the specs, the onboard experience, and what makes this boat a favourite among groups.

K80 Specs: Size, Capacity & Departure Point

The K80 measures 24 metres in length, making it one of the larger vessels in our fleet. It is licensed for 12 passengers, so you can bring a full group without exceeding the legal limit. All charters depart from Puerto Banús, the iconic marina in Marbella that is home to superyachts, designer boutiques, and buzzing beach clubs. The K80's size gives you plenty of deck space to spread out, whether you want sunbathing on the bow, shade on the flybridge, or air-conditioned comfort in the saloon.

What's Included in the K80 Charter

Every K80 charter includes a licensed skipper, fuel, insurance, and Spanish IVA (21%). You also get unlimited water, soft drinks, beer, white wine, cava, and light snacks throughout the trip. A jet ski is included free of charge, which adds an extra layer of excitement for guests who want to zip across the water. There are no hidden extras — the price quoted is all-inclusive for the duration you book.

Onboard Experience: Flybridge, Saloon & Sun Areas

The K80's layout is designed for socialising. The flybridge is the main hangout spot, with a helm station, seating, and a sun pad area. Below, the indoor saloon offers a lounge, dining table, and a small galley. The bow has a large sun pad for those who want to work on their tan. The stern platform makes boarding and water access easy. Throughout the day, the skipper will anchor at a calm spot where you can swim, use the jet ski, or simply float in the Mediterranean.

Best Itineraries for the K80 in Marbella

With 4 hours or more, you can reach several top destinations. A popular route heads east towards Cabopino, a quiet sandy cove with a dune reserve. Alternatively, go west to Cala del Faro or Cala Cortés, rocky coves with crystal-clear water. For a longer trip, Estepona's marina and Sotogrande's exclusive port are within reach. The skipper will tailor the route to your preferences and the day's conditions. Read our Marbella boat itineraries guide for more ideas.

K80 vs Other Large Yachts in Our Fleet

The K80 is one of several 24-metre yachts we offer. It shares its length with the Mangusta 80 (available in grey and white variants), though the Mangusta has a different layout and a more open aft deck. The Canados 86 (26m) and Ferretti 94 (29m) are larger options if you need extra space. For a full list of available boats, visit our boat rental Marbella page.

Pricing & How to Book the K80

Pricing for the K80 is on request because durations and seasonal demand vary. The minimum charter is 4 hours, and the all-inclusive rate covers everything listed above. To book, simply contact us via WhatsApp with your preferred date, number of guests, and desired duration. We will confirm availability and provide a quote. For other yachts with fixed pricing, see our fleet page.

Frequently asked questions

How many people can the K80 in Marbella accommodate?

The K80 is licensed for a maximum of 12 guests. This is the legal limit including children, so your party cannot exceed 12 passengers.

Does the K80 charter include a jet ski?

Yes, the K80 charter includes a jet ski at no extra cost. You can use it during the trip, subject to safety instructions from the skipper.

What is the minimum charter duration for the K80?

The minimum charter for the K80 is 4 hours. Longer durations are available and recommended to explore further destinations like Estepona or Sotogrande.

What drinks and food are provided on the K80?

All charters include water, soft drinks, beer, white wine, cava, and light snacks. You are welcome to bring your own food or arrange catering via our team.

Can I choose the itinerary on the K80?

Yes, the itinerary is flexible. The skipper will suggest a route based on weather and your preferences. Popular options include Cabopino, Cala del Faro, and Estepona.

Is the K80 suitable for corporate events or celebrations?

Absolutely. The K80's spacious flybridge and saloon make it ideal for corporate entertaining, birthdays, or any group celebration. Contact us for bespoke arrangements.

What is the cancellation policy for the K80 charter?

Cancellations are subject to our standard terms. We recommend checking with our team at the time of booking for the specific policy. Weather-related cancellations are handled flexibly.

How do I book the K80 in Marbella?

Booking is via WhatsApp or our website. Since pricing is on request, simply contact us with your preferred date and duration, and we will confirm availability and quote.
